creator: koshy@india.hp.com
text:
A new port for XaoS-2.2 has been uploaded to ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/.
The file name is "XaoS-2.2-port.tar.gz".

XaoS is a fast fractal browser; improved algorithms allow interactive
zooming of fractal images even on i486 class machines.  11 fractal
types are supported in this release.

XaoS is covered by the GNU Public License.
